title: Idle Freeze (Server)
description: Pauses your Minecraft server when nobody is online.
body:
## Need help? Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/2698cavvue).

## Overview
**Idle Freeze** will stop time from progressing in your Minecraft world when nobody is online. Once a player joins the game, things will continue as normal as if nothing happened.

## Using versions 1.21.3+?
Your server will automatically pause by default after 60 seconds when no one is online, meaning you do not have to install Idle Freeze. To check this, go into your `server.properties` and find this line:
```
pause-when-empty-seconds=60
```
